tasks.label: dev:backend
tasks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),cp=require('child_process');let p=process.cwd();while(!(fs.existsSync(path.join(p,'api'))&&fs.existsSync(path.join(p,'backend')))){const parent=path.dirname(p);if(parent===p) throw new Error('Project root not found');p=parent;}cp.execSync('npm run backend:dev',{cwd:p,stdio:'inherit'});"

background.endsPattern: Backend dev server running at http://localhost:3000

tasks.label: dev:frontend
tasks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),cp=require('child_process');let p=process.cwd();while(!(fs.existsSync(path.join(p,'api'))&&fs.existsSync(path.join(p,'backend')))){const parent=path.dirname(p);if(parent===p) throw new Error('Project root not found');p=parent;}cp.execSync('npm --prefix frontend start -- --port 4200',{cwd:p,stdio:'inherit'});"

background.endsPattern: Application bundle generation complete|Watch mode enabled|Compiled successfully|Local:\s*http://localhost:4200
